items.name: Components-V2-for-discord
items.description: This code builds and sends a Discord Components V2 message using discord.js. It creates a styled container with a header, body text, and footer separated by dividers, adds an optional button row, then sends (or edits) the message to a channel with the IsComponentsV2 flag enabled.
